description: You are a security engineer at a financial services company. The threat intelligence team has received the latest Feodo Tracker botnet Command and Control (C2) IP blocklist from abuse.ch, staged at /tmp/feodotracker_c2_ips.txt. Operationalize this threat intelligence by integrating it into Wazuh's detection engine using the CDB list feature. Ensure that network activity involving these IP addresses generates a persistent security alert (level 9 or above) by creating custom detection rules. Dashboard login: admin/SecretPassword at https://localhost. API credentials: wazuh-wui/MyS3cr37P450r.*- at https://localhost:55000.

metadata.description: Integrate Feodo Tracker C2 IPs into Wazuh CDB list with detection rules
